title: Darts and Blowpipes
description: A mod that adds darts and blowpipes
body:
This mod adds darts and blowpipes.

**Darts** are a throwable ranged weapon, they deal roughly the same damage as an uncharged arrow. Holding down right-click makes them more accurate when they are thrown.

Attacking enemies from behind with darts will prevent them from noticing you.

If a dart is shot from a dispenser, they travel thrice as far and are always shot at 100% accuracy.

They are crafted as follows:

![Dart Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/133bdc1d339b964c30c38fee66aebac32bebfbcf.png)

Darts can also have effects to them just like arrows.

![Imbued Darts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f465c31f0e7184d5770058dc22815f9c5fb8c9d5.png)

They are crafted similarly to tipped arrows:

![Imbued Dart Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d17f5265dc25b6c52cf218b9566bd269ba46c1c5.png)

Imbued darts do not show particles at all. The only way to know if such thing happens is if it actually hits.

**Blowpipes** on the other hand, are ranged weapons that uses darts and seeds for ammo. Blowpipes have a cooldown, but it makes sure every dart you fire is 100% accurate.

If seeds are used instead, they deal 50% less damage but are automatically planted on farmland.

They are crafted as follows:

![Blowpipe Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cca542cb57a15bbbe5a5498051db0fcb5a35e0b1.png)

Blowpipes receive bow and crossbow enchantments. They can also be used to craft dispensers.

_Compatibility:_

If you have my **Atlatl** mod, they can use darts for ammo.
